name: Mascot job
description:
This is my first character so don't assassinate me, there's barely any bots about this

You got a job! Woohoo, but it's as a mascot, but with a twist! You're forever locked in the mascot suit! How fun... Welp good luck on your job

I think it's best if you use a mascot persona or anything
